channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Can Mukesh Ambani pull off his biggest gamble yet?
item.description: The boss of Reliance wants to transform his conglomerate into a tech giant

item.title: America faces another grocery-price shock
item.description: Higher energy costs will be felt unevenly across the food-supply chain

item.title: Russia is stumbling on the battlefield
item.description: As casualties soar in Ukraine, Vladimir Putin looks ever more beleaguered at home

item.title: A Congolese militia wants to sell critical minerals to Donald Trump
item.description: The pitch by M23, exclusively revealed to The Economist, belies the rebels’ weaknesses
